TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kb’bu, title = Kb’bu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kb’bu} }

S.FORM: alang Kb'bu ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 70 buwan, 268 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 250 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kb'bu hya' ga Kmuyaw. tay 'llaw na Kb'bu hya' ga B'bukeykay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kb'bu ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 70 buwan, 268 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 250 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kb'bu hya' ga Kmuyaw. tay 'llaw na Kb'bu hya' ga B'bukeykay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kβʔβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kβʔβu ħjaʔ ɣa kmujaw. taj ʔllaw na kβʔβu ħjaʔ ɣa βʔβukejkaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
